7075.title: Uncovering The Date Rape Killer
7075.description: Documentary tracing the movements of the date rape killer, investigating the links between his numerous victims and the mounting pressure on the Police to link this evidence to one suspect.

7076.title: Judge Judy
7076.description: A plane's emergency landing in the middle of a field of peas leads to a disputer over damages; the pea crop owner claims they were only a day away from being harvested.

7077.title: Cheaters
7077.description: Nina worries that her producer boyfriend is making music with another woman. Angie wants to know why her husband is always texting.

7078.title: World's Most Evil Killers
7078.description: Delve into the sordid minds of some of the most notorious murderers on the planet.

7079.title: Judge Judy
7079.description: Teen lovers accuse a landlord of unlawfully disposing of their property, but he countersues for vandalism and attempted assault.

7080.title: Judge Judy
7080.description: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for unpaid loans and each wants the Foosball table and barbecue.

7081.title: Judge Judy
7081.description: A mother sues her daughter for a bail money loan. Then, a couple accuses a limo company of leaving them stranded.

7082.title: Something's Killing Me
7082.description: Florida college student Lindsey Meyer and Michigan E.M.T Kevin Nesbit both come down with a painful sore throat. What seem like symptoms of a common cold, soon spiral into a life or death situation.

7083.title: Operation Repo
7083.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7084.title: Operation Repo
7084.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

7085.title: Judge Judy
7085.description: A formerly engaged pair feud over a dog, an engagement ring and damages to a home.

7086.title: Judge Judy
7086.description: The plaintiff says his daughter was injured in a car crash that caused $25,000 in damages; the driver denies liability.

7087.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
7087.description: Team Salvage is tasked with towing a yacht to a boat yard. However, the yacht has a broken keel and can no longer be steered.

7088.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
7088.description: The team continues its relentless pursuit of one of Jerry's bonds in Texas. Meanwhile, the Chapmans continue to train Jerry's men and a K-9 is added to the team.

7089.title: Close Calls On Camera
7089.description: A group of hikers are enjoying a day on Dartmoor when one falls, landing on rocks below. Also, a young couple and their baby flee a hotel fire after a fellow guest alerts them to the danger.

7092.title: Paranormal Survivor
7092.description: Ghosts, poltergeists, demons and their targets star in `Paranormal Survivor.' Hour-long episodes feature people reliving their harrowing encounters with the supernatural. Viewers hear from those who've faced the feared spirits, and dramatic re-creations lure victims back to the scenes of the confrontations.

7093.title: Judge Judy
7093.description: a party-bus owner accuses a client of damaging his vehicle in a drunken fist-fight.

7094.title: Judge Judy
7094.description: A mother demands payback after her daughter's dog requires an emergency C-section.

7095.title: Judge Judy
7095.description: A woman with 42 birds sues a breeder and rescuer for the return of two macaws and a cage.

7101.description: Ex-lovers fight over a loan, the price on an evangelist's seminar causes a rift between sisters, and a teen is accused of damaging a car with a paintball gun.

7102.description: A man accuses his ex-girlfriend of attempted assault and vandalism, a man sues his ex-wife for her share of their daughter's college tuition.

7113.title: Cheaters
7113.description: Chaz worries that wife Brandy's newly divorced friend will bring out the party girl in her. Luke's partner complains that he does not give her enough space.

7114.title: Fame Kills
7114.description: A beautiful young woman who grew up in the suburbs of Los Angeles is determined to be a star but while trying to make connections in Hollywood, she ends up in the sights of a deadly serial killing duo.

7115.title: Paranormal Survivor
7115.description: Teenagers Gaye and her sister summon the dead; Marina Duarte is plagued by paranormal activity after a spirit board session; Lisa discovers that not all the ghosts haunting her childhood home are evil.
